CxParameter.Description: master recipe being executed

CxParameter.name: RecID
CxParameter.Description: Recipe Identifier - The identifier of the master recipe executing on the equipment

CxParameter.name: RecipeParameters
CxParameter.Description: The recipe parameter settings applied to the module recipe to alter this instance of execution

CxParameter.name: StepCount
CxParameter.Description: A value that represents the number of recipe steps executed. This counter shall have a value of 1 for the first step executed for the module process and is incremented for each successive step as it begins execution

CxParameter.name: StepID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the recipe step definition within the recipe

CxParameter.Description: Substrate Identifer - This data parameter shall report the ID of the substrate processed by this recipe execution

CxParameter.Description: List of identifiers for the substrates processed by this recipe execution

CxState.name: Control
CxState.Description: Control State Model

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: OffLine
CxState.Description: Operation of the equipment is performed by the operator at the operator console, messaging for any automation purpose is severely limited

CxState.name: AttemptOnLine
CxState.Description: Equipment attempting to change state to OnLine

CxState.name: EquipmentOffLine
CxState.Description: System maintains the OffLine state and requires operator instructions to attempt to go OnLine

CxState.name: HostOffLine
CxState.Description: Equipment is intent on being Online, however, the Host has not agreed

CxState.name: OnLine
CxState.Description: Automation messages may be exchanged

CxState.name: Local
CxState.Description: Operation of the equipment is implemented by direct action of an operator

CxState.name: Remote
CxState.Description: Operation of the equipment is implemented by host automation

CxTransition.Description: Equipment accepts Offline message from host (S1F15)

CxEvent.name: EquipmentOffline
CxEvent.Description: Control State Machine switched to the offline state.

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|10|EquipmentOffline|1|34|Control State Machine switched to the offline state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||1|2|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Equipment accepts Online message from host (S1F17)
Operator sets control to Offline

CxTransition.name: 1a
CxTransition.Description: System initialized and default startup control state set to OffLine

CxTransition.name: 1b
CxTransition.Description: System initialized and default startup control state set to Online

CxTransition.name: 2a
CxTransition.Description: Default Offline state set to EquipmentOffline

CxTransition.name: 2b
CxTransition.Description: Default Offline state set to AttemptOnLine

CxTransition.name: 2c
CxTransition.Description: Default Offline state set to HostOffLine
Operator sets control to OnLine, S1F1 sent to host

CxTransition.name: 4a
CxTransition.Description: Communication failure occurred, a reply timeout occurred, or an S1F0 was received; and the AttemptOnLine fail option is set to EquipmentOffline

CxTransition.name: 4b
CxTransition.Description: Communication failure occurred, a reply timeout occurred, or an S1F0 was received; and the AttemptOnLine fail option is set to HostOffline
Equipment received S1F2 message from the host
Operator sets control to OffLine

CxTransition.name: 7a
CxTransition.Description: Default OnLine state is Local

CxEvent.name: ControlStateLocal
CxEvent.Description: Control State Machine switched to local (operator) control.

CxTransition.name: 7b
CxTransition.Description: Default OnLine state is Remote

CxEvent.name: ControlStateRemote
CxEvent.Description: Control State Machine switched to remote (host) control.

CxTransition.Description: Operator sets control state to Remote
Equipment accepts Offline message from host (S1F15)

CxParameterType.name: BlockedReasonEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Indentifies the most recent blocked condition of the related EPT module

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Not Blocked - EPT Module is not blocked (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Unknown - The blocked reason is unknown (corresponds to SECS value 1)
SafetyThreshold - A safety threshold value has been crossed (corresponds to SECS value 2)
Error Condition - An error condition has occurred within the EPT Module (corresponds to SECS value 3)
ParametricException - A parametric error was detected (corresponds to SECS value 4)
Abort - Process is Aborting or has Aborted (corresponds to SECS value 5)
Pause - Process is Pausing or has Paused (corresponds to SECS value 6)

CxParameterType.name: boolean
CxParameterType.Description: Defines a primitive data type with the values of true and false

CxParameterType.name: CarrierHoldEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Value of the E87 CarrierHoldTrigger.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Host Release - both bixed buffer and internal buffer equipment shall hold the carrier at the write position until the CarrierRelease service is received.
Equipment Release - the equipment shall release the carrier based on the Carrier Object state model transition of CarrierComplete orCarrier Stopped.

CxParameterType.name: CarrierSlotList
CxParameterType.Description: Carrier and slots used in an action

Field.name: CarrierID
Field.Description: Identifier of the carrier

Field.name: Slots
Field.Description: List of slots within the carrier

CxParameterType.name: String80
CxParameterType.Description: 80 characters maximum; modified primitive string data type with a limited number of characters

CxParameterType.name: SlotArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of slots involved

CxParameterType.name: short
CxParameterType.Description: Defines a primitive data type representing a signed two byte integer value

CxParameterType.name: ControlStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Equipment Control State

EnumeratedInteger.Description: EquipmentOffLine - System maintains the OffLine state and requires operator instructions to attempt to go OnLine (corresponds to SECS value 1)
AttemptOnLine - Equipment attempting to change state to OnLine (corresponds to SECS value 2)
HostOffLine - Equipment is intent on being Online, however, the Host has not agreed (corresponds to SECS value 3)
Local - Operation of the equipment is implemented by direct action of an operator (corresponds to SECS value 4)
Remote - Operation of the equipment is implemented by host automation (corresponds to SECS value 5)

CxParameterType.name: dateTime
CxParameterType.Description: Defines a primitive data type representing a date and time

CxParameterType.name: DisableEventOnTransitionArray
CxParameterType.Description: A list of zero to nine EPT State Model transitions for which event reporting to the host are disabled

CxParameterType.name: EPTElementTypeEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Indicates whether this EPTTracker object refers to the equipment or an EPT module

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Equipment - EPT Tracker describes the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 0)
ProductionEPTModule - EPT Tracker describes a production module within the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 1)
LoadPortEPTModule - EPT Tracker describes an EFEM or Load Port EPT within the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 2)

CxParameterType.name: EPTStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: The EPT state of this equipment or EPT module

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Idle - Equipment or Module is Idle (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Busy - Equipment or Module is Busy (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Blocked - Equipment or Module is Blocked (corresponds to SECS value 2)

CxParameterType.name: float
CxParameterType.Description: Defines a primitive data type representing a four byte floating point value

CxParameterType.name: int
CxParameterType.Description: Defines a primitive data type representing a signed four byte integer value with no units of measure

CxParameterType.name: long
CxParameterType.Description: Defines a primitive data type representing a signed eight byte integer value

CxParameterType.name: PauseEventArray
CxParameterType.Description: Array of events that will cause the job to pause

CxParameterType.name: PPChangeStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Action taken on the process program

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Created - Process program created (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Edited - Process program edited or modified (corresponds to SECS value 2)
Deleted - Process program deleted (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: PPFormatEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Indicates the type of process programs and recipes that are supported

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Unformatted process programs
Formatted process programs
Both unformatted and formatted process programs
Execution Recipes
Large unformatted process programs
Large formatted process programs
Both large unformatted and large formatted process programs
Large execution recipes
Both execution recipes and large execution recipes
Both unformatted and large unformatted process programs
Both formatted and large formatted process programs
Both unformatted and large formatted process programs
Both formatted and large unformatted process programs
Unformatted, large unformated, and large formatted process programs
Formatted, large unformatted, and large formatted process programs
Formatted, unformatted, large unformatted, and large formatted process programs

CxParameterType.name: PreviousEPTStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: The PreviousEPTState provides the previous EPT state enumerated value and EPTEquipmentPrevState provides the EPT state identifier for the state machine previous state. The values for these parameters have a one-to-one correspondence

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Idle - Equipment or Module is Idle (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Busy - Equipment or Module is Busy (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Blocked - Equipment or Module is Blocked (corresponds to SECS value 2)
NoState - No previous state exists for Equipment or Module (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: ProcessJobIDArray
CxParameterType.Description: Array of Process Jobs processed by the recipe execution; each string holds a PRJobID

CxParameterType.name: ProcessStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: The processing state of the equipment.

EnumeratedString.Description: All external conditions necessary for process execution are satisfied
Equipment is ready for process execution and is awaiting a Start command from the operator or host
Equipment is executing a process program automatically and can continue to do so without external intervention
Processing is suspended and the equipment is awaiting a command

CxParameterType.name: RecipeVariable
CxParameterType.Description: Recipe variable used to tune a process recipe

Field.name: RecipeVarName
Field.Description: The name of the recipe variable

CxParameterType.name: RecipeVarValue
CxParameterType.Description: Value of the recipe variable

CxParameterType.name: RecipeVariableArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of variables supporting a recipe method

CxParameterType.name: ShortType
CxParameterType.Description: Integer Type Description

CxParameterType.name: String128
CxParameterType.Description: 128 characters maximum; modified primitive string data type with a limited number of characters

CxParameterType.name: String255
CxParameterType.Description: 255 characters maximum; modified primitive string data type with a limited number of characters

CxParameterType.name: String32
CxParameterType.Description: 32 characters maximum; modified primitive string data type with a limited number of characters

CxParameterType.name: StringType
CxParameterType.Description: StringType Description

CxParameterType.name: SubstrateIDArray
CxParameterType.Description: Array of substrates processed by the recipe execution; each string holds a Substrate ID

CxParameterType.name: TaskTypeEnum
CxParameterType.Description: The type of task running on this EPT module

EnumeratedInteger.Description: NoTask - EPT Module is Idle (or NoState for previous value)(corresponds to SECS value 0)
Unspecified - Type of task is not specified (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Process - Normal or desired manufacturing operations that are capable of adding value by physical-chemical change or providing critical process information (corresponds to SECS value 2)
Support - Normal or desired manufacturing operations that are incapable of adding value(corresponds to SECS value 3)
Maintenance - Any task that is intended to change the state of the equipment for the purpose of maintaining equipment functionality or performance (corresponds to SECS value 4)

Diagnostics - Any task that obtains information about the status of the equipment for the purpose of determining the equipment's health or identifying an equipment problem(corresponds to SECS value 5)
Waiting - An equipment initiated task that indicates the module is encountering normal waiting periods as part of its normal wafer processing scenario (corresponds to SECS value 6)

CxParameterType.name: TimeFormatEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Format for reporting date and time information

EnumeratedInteger.Description: 12-ByteFormat - Date and Time reported in the 12 character form of YYMMDDhhmmss
16-ByteFormat - Date and Time reported in the 16 character form of YYYMMDDhhmmsscc
ExtendedMax32ByteFormat - Date and Time reported in the form of YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sTZD

CxParameterType.name: TransitionEnum
CxParameterType.Description: The most recent transition that updated the tracker

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Transition 1a, 1b, or 1c occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 2 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 3 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 4 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 5 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 6 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 7 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 8 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)
Transition 9 occurred (See E116:EPTStateModule and E116:EPTStateEquipment state machine definition)

CxParameterType.name: UnclampControlEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Value of the E87 UnclampControlTrigger.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: CarrierComplete/CarrierStopped Triggered Unclamp - The equipment automatically unclamps the carrier when the Carrier Status transitions fo CarrierComplete or CarrierStopped.
AMHS Triggered Unclamp - The equipment behavior depends upon the LoadPortAccess state.

CxUnit.name: non-dimensional quantity
CxUnit.Description: Quantities not associated with a unit of measurement

CxParameter.Description: Current reservation state for all load ports

CxParameter.name: PortAssociationStateList
CxParameter.Description: Current association state for all load ports

CxParameter.name: PortStateInfoList
CxParameter.Description: List of PortStateInfo for all load ports

CxParameter.name: PortTransferStateList
CxParameter.Description: Current transfer state for all load ports

CxEvent.Description: Carrier is clamped to the load port

CxEvent.Description: Carrier access door closed

CxEvent.Description: Carrier ID read failed at a load port in the NotAssociated state

CxEvent.name: CarrierOpened
CxEvent.Description: Carrier access door opened

CxEvent.name: CarrierUnclamped
CxEvent.Description: Carrier unclamped from the load port

CxEvent.Description: ID Reader became available

CxEvent.name: IDReaderUnavailable
CxEvent.Description: ID Reader became unavailable

CxParameter.name: AccessMode
CxParameter.Description: Access mode of the Load Port. This parameter merges the E87 AccessModei SV and the AccessMode DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: AccessModeCurrState
CxParameter.Description: Access mode of the Load Port. This parameter merges the E87 AccessModei SV and the AccessMode DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: BypassReadID
CxParameter.Description: Enables (true) or Disables (false) automatic ID acceptance when the carrier ID reader is unavailable

CxParameter.name: LoadPortCarrierAssociationCurrState
CxParameter.Description: The association state of the load port . This parameter merges the E87 PortAssociationStatei SV and the PortAssociationState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: LoadPortReservationCurrState
CxParameter.Description: Reservation state of the Load Port. This parameter merges the E87 LoadPortReservationStatei SV and the LoadPortReservationState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: LoadPortReservationState
CxParameter.Description: Reservation state of the Load Port. This parameter merges the E87 LoadPortReservationStatei SV and the LoadPortReservationState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: LoadPortTransferCurrState
CxParameter.Description: Current transfer state of this load port. This parameter merges the E87 PortTransferStatei SV and the PortTransferState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: PortAssociationState
CxParameter.Description: The association state of the load port . This parameter merges the E87 PortAssociationStatei SV and the PortAssociationState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: PortID
CxParameter.Description: Port Id of the carrier location.

CxParameter.name: PortStateInfo
CxParameter.Description: PortAssociationState combined with the PortTransferState of this Load Port. This parameter merges the E87 PortStateInfoi SV and the PortStateInfo DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: PortTransferState
CxParameter.Description: Current transfer state of this load port. This parameter merges the E87 PortTransferStatei SV and the PortTransferState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPAMSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Access Mode State Model for load port 1

CxEvent.name: E87Auto2Manual
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has executed a Change Access service with the value of Manual

CxEvent.name: E87Manual2Auto
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has executed a Change Access service with the value of Auto

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2Auto
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2Manual
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPCASM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Load Port / Carrier Association State Model for load port 1

CxEvent.name: E87Associated2Associated
CxEvent.Description: Equipment based verification fails and the carrier assumes the ID value from the carrier that is on the load port, or a carrier is unloaded and a queued CarrierOut service starts. The existing carrierID that was associated by a Bind service is unassociated and the new carrierID is now associated to the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87Associated2NotAssociated
CxEvent.Description: Host sends a CancelBind to the equipment before the carrier arrives or before a transfer sequence has started, or carrier is removed from the load port externally or to an internal buffer position

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2NotAssociated
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxEvent.name: E87NotAssociated2Associated
CxEvent.Description: Host sends a Bind when the port is unoccupied, carrier created because the host sends either a ProceedWithCarrier or CancelCarrier, Carrier ID not currently existing at the equipment successfully read, or a known carrier to the equipment is being moved onto the load port from an internal location

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPRSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Load Port Reservation State Model for load port 1

CxEvent.name: E87NotReserved2Reserved
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator sends a ReserveAtPort or Bind to the equipment, or a CarrierOut occurs on the equipment

CxEvent.name: E87Reserved2NotReserved
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator sends a CancelBind or a CancelReservationAtPort, or a carrier arrives at the reserved port

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPTSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Load Port Transfer State Model for load port 1

CxEvent.name: E87InService2OutOfService
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of InService

CxEvent.name: E87InService2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset, and the load port is not currently available for carrier transfer

CxEvent.name: E87InService2TransferReady
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port or system was reset

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2InService
CxEvent.Description: System reset, prior state was in service

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2OutOfService
CxEvent.Description: System reset, prior state was out of service

CxEvent.name: E87OutOfService2InService
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of OutOfService

CxEvent.name: E87ReadyToLoad2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual load transfer, an automated PIO load transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, or a CarrierOut service is started for this load port

CxEvent.name: E87ReadyToUnload2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual unload transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, a CarrierIn service is started for this load port, or a CarrierReCreate service has been issued by the host or operator

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2ReadytoLoad
CxEvent.Description: Manual carrier unload transfer has completed and the Load Port is now empty and ready for load transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer ends with the PIO Compt signal, or the carrier has finished its move from the load port into the internal buffer and no CarrierOut services are queued for this load port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2ReadytoUnload
CxEvent.Description: Processing for substrates contained with the carrier has complete, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been issued, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position on the load port while in Manual; Processing for the substrates belonging to the carrier has completed, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been received, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position while in Automatic

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2TransferReady
CxEvent.Description: Transfer was unsuccessful and the carrier has not loaded or unloaded

CxEvent.name: E87TransferReady2ReadyToLoad
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and no carrier is present on the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferReady2ReadyToUnload
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and a carrier is present on the Load Port

CxMaterialLocation.name: FIMS1
CxMaterialLocation.Description: Load Port FIMS Location - place where Carrier is docked and can be opened

CxParameter.name: LocationID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the carrier location. This parameter corresponds to the E87 LocationIDi SV

CxParameter.name: MaterialID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the material in the location (empty for none). This parameter corresponds to the E87 CarrierIDi SV

CxMaterialLocation.name: LP1
CxMaterialLocation.Description: Load Port Load/Unload Location - place where a Carrier is delivered and picked up

CxParameter.name: LocationID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the carrier location. This parameter corresponds to the E87 LocationIDi SV

CxParameter.name: MaterialID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the material in the location (empty for none). This parameter corresponds to the E87 CarrierIDi SV

CxLogicalElement.Description: Non-structural element representing the EPTTracker for Module

CxParameter.Description: A numeric code that identifies the most recent blocked condition of the related EPT module.

CxParameter.name: BlockedReasonText
CxParameter.Description: A description of the most recent blocked condition of the Equipment or EPT module.

CxParameter.Description: PortAssociationState combined with the PortTransferState of this Load Port. This parameter merges the E87 PortStateInfoi SV and the PortStateInfo DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxParameter.name: PortTransferState
CxParameter.Description: Current transfer state of this load port. This parameter merges the E87 PortTransferStatei SV and the PortTransferState DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID)

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPAMSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Access Mode State Model for load port 2

CxEvent.name: E87Auto2Manual
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has executed a Change Access service with the value of Manual

CxEvent.name: E87Manual2Auto
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has executed a Change Access service with the value of Auto

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2Auto
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2Manual
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPCASM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Load Port / Carrier Association State Model for load port 2

CxEvent.name: E87Associated2Associated
CxEvent.Description: Equipment based verification fails and the carrier assumes the ID value from the carrier that is on the load port, or a carrier is unloaded and a queued CarrierOut service starts. The existing carrierID that was associated by a Bind service is unassociated and the new carrierID is now associated to the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87Associated2NotAssociated
CxEvent.Description: Host sends a CancelBind to the equipment before the carrier arrives or before a transfer sequence has started, or carrier is removed from the load port externally or to an internal buffer position

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2NotAssociated
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxEvent.name: E87NotAssociated2Associated
CxEvent.Description: Host sends a Bind when the port is unoccupied, carrier created because the host sends either a ProceedWithCarrier or CancelCarrier, Carrier ID not currently existing at the equipment successfully read, or a known carrier to the equipment is being moved onto the load port from an internal location

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPRSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Load Port Reservation State Model for load port 2

CxEvent.name: E87NotReserved2Reserved
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator sends a ReserveAtPort or Bind to the equipment, or a CarrierOut occurs on the equipment

CxEvent.name: E87Reserved2NotReserved
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator sends a CancelBind or a CancelReservationAtPort, or a carrier arrives at the reserved port

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E87LPTSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Load Port Transfer State Model for load port 2

CxEvent.name: E87InService2OutOfService
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of InService

CxEvent.name: E87InService2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset, and the load port is not currently available for carrier transfer

CxEvent.name: E87InService2TransferReady
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port or system was reset

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2InService
CxEvent.Description: System reset, prior state was in service

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2OutOfService
CxEvent.Description: System reset, prior state was out of service

CxEvent.name: E87OutOfService2InService
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of OutOfService

CxEvent.name: E87ReadyToLoad2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual load transfer, an automated PIO load transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, or a CarrierOut service is started for this load port

CxEvent.name: E87ReadyToUnload2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual unload transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, a CarrierIn service is started for this load port, or a CarrierReCreate service has been issued by the host or operator

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2ReadytoLoad
CxEvent.Description: Manual carrier unload transfer has completed and the Load Port is now empty and ready for load transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer ends with the PIO Compt signal, or the carrier has finished its move from the load port into the internal buffer and no CarrierOut services are queued for this load port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2ReadytoUnload
CxEvent.Description: Processing for substrates contained with the carrier has complete, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been issued, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position on the load port while in Manual; Processing for the substrates belonging to the carrier has completed, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been received, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position while in Automatic

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2TransferReady
CxEvent.Description: Transfer was unsuccessful and the carrier has not loaded or unloaded

CxEvent.name: E87TransferReady2ReadyToLoad
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and no carrier is present on the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferReady2ReadyToUnload
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and a carrier is present on the Load Port

CxMaterialLocation.name: FIMS2
CxMaterialLocation.Description: Load Port FIMS Location - place where Carrier is docked and can be opened

CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the material in the location (empty for none). This parameter corresponds to the E87 CarrierIDi SV

CxParameter.name: LocationID

CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the material in the location (empty for none). This parameter corresponds to the E87 CarrierIDi SV

CxLogicalElement.name: EPTTracker
CxLogicalElement.Description: Non-structural element representing the EPTTracker for Module

CxParameter.name: BlockedReason
CxParameter.Description: A numeric code that identifies the most recent blocked condition of the related EPT module.

CxParameter.name: BlockedReasonText
CxParameter.Description: A description of the most recent blocked condition of the Equipment or EPT module.

CxParameter.name: DisableEventOnTransition
CxParameter.Description: List of transitions (1-9) for which EPTStateChange will not be triggered

CxParameter.name: EPTElementName
CxParameter.Description: A human-understandable name for this equipment or module, which must be unique amoung all objects of EPTTracker type.

CxParameter.name: EPTModuleCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.name: EPTModulePrevState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the previous state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.name: EPTState
CxParameter.Description: The current EPT state of this equipment or EPT module.

CxParameter.name: EPTStateTime
CxParameter.Description: Time spent in the previous EPT State, prior to entering the current EPTState.

CxParameter.name: PreviousEPTState
CxParameter.Description: The PreviousEPTState provides the previous EPT state enumerated value and EPTEquipmentPrevState provides the EPT state identifier for the state machine previous state.

CxParameter.name: PreviousTaskName
CxParameter.Description: Name of the EPT Task previously running on the EPT module, prior to starting the current EPT Task.

CxParameter.name: PreviousTaskType
CxParameter.Description: Type of the EPT Task previously running on this EPT module, prior to starting the current EPT Task.

CxParameter.name: TaskName
CxParameter.Description: Name of the EPT Task currently running on this EPT module.

CxParameter.name: TaskType
CxParameter.Description: The type of EPT Task currently running on this EPT module.

CxParameter.name: EPTModuleCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.name: EPTModulePrevState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the previous state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.Description: The EPTState provides the current EPT state enumerated value and EPTEquipmentCurrState provides the EPT state identifier for the state machine current state.

CxParameter.name: EPTStateTime
CxParameter.Description: Time spent in the previous EPT State, prior to entering the current EPTState.

CxParameter.name: PreviousEPTState
CxParameter.Description: The PreviousEPTState provides the previous EPT state enumerated value and EPTEquipmentPrevState provides the EPT state identifier for the state machine previous state.

CxParameter.name: PreviousTaskName
CxParameter.Description: Name of the EPT Task previously running on the EPT module, prior to starting the current EPT Task.

CxParameter.name: PreviousTaskType
CxParameter.Description: Type of the EPT Task previously running on this EPT module, prior to starting the current EPT Task.

CxParameter.name: TaskName
CxParameter.Description: Name of the EPT Task currently running on this EPT module.

CxParameter.name: TaskType
CxParameter.Description: The type of EPT Task currently running on this EPT module.

CxParameter.name: TrackerEventID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier for the event that triggered for a change in the state model for this tracker. This parameter corresponds to the E116 EPTTracker TrackerEventID attribute.

CxParameter.name: Transition
CxParameter.Description: The most recent transition that updated the tracker. This parameter corresponds to the EPTTracker Transition attribute.

CxParameter.name: TransitionTimestamp
CxParameter.Description: The timestamp when the most recent transition occurred and collection event was triggered that set the tracker to its current state. This parameter corresponds to the E116 EPTTracker TransitionTimestamp attribute. This parameter is reported in the standard E5 TimeFormat.

CxStateMachine.name: EPTEquipment
CxStateMachine.Description: Equipment Performance State Model for Equipment

CxState.name: EPTEquipment
CxState.Description: Equipment Performance State Model for Equipment

CxState.name: Blocked
CxState.Description: A fault condition exists that prevents the EPT module from completing its task, a fault condition exists that prevents the EPT module from starting a new task, the EPT module is pausing (or aborting) resulting from a pause (or abort) directive, the EPT module has paused its task and is awaiting a resume, or the EPT module fails to initialize upon start-up

CxState.name: Busy
CxState.Description: The module is executing a task and no fault condition exists in the module that prevents the execution of a task

CxState.name: Idle
CxState.Description: No material is present, the module is not executing a task, and no fault condition exists in the module that prevents it from starting a new task

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxTransition.name: 1a
CxTransition.Description: EPT Module initialization complete, a fault exists, or the EPT module cannot be initialized

CxTransition.name: 1b
CxTransition.Description: EPT Module initialization complete, a fault exists, or the EPT module cannot be initialized

CxTransition.name: 1c
CxTransition.Description: EPT Module initialization complete, no fault exists, and material is present
EPT Module starts execution of a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: EPT Module completes execution of a task and material is removed from the EPT Module

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: EPT Module starts execution of a new task upon the normal completion of the previous task. EPTStateTime and PreviousEPTStateTime do not change

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: A pause command is received that pauses the EPT module, an abort command is received that aborts the EPT module, or a fault condition occurs that prevents the EPT module from executing its task. TaskName and TaskType do not change

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: All fault conditions that prevented task execution are cleared and the EPT Module resumes execution of its tasks or starts execution of a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: All fault conditions that prevented task execution are cleared, all material is removed from the EPT module, and EPT Module can begin a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: Material arrives at the EPT Module and the EPT Module cannot begin executing a task on the material, or a fault condition occurs which prevents the EPTModule from starting a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: Fault conditions occur that prevent the EPT Module from resuming a blocked task, or starting a new task. EPTStateTime and PreviousEPTStateTime do not change

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxStateMachine.name: EPTModule
CxStateMachine.Description: Equipment Performance State Model for Modules

CxState.name: EPTModule
CxState.Description: Equipment Performance State Model for Modules

CxState.name: Blocked
CxState.Description: A fault condition exists that prevents the EPT module from completing its task, a fault condition exists that prevents the EPT module from starting a new task, the EPT module is pausing (or aborting) resulting from a pause (or abort) directive, the EPT module has paused its task and is awaiting a resume, or the EPT module fails to initialize upon start-up

CxState.name: Busy
CxState.Description: The module is executing a task and no fault condition exists in the module that prevents the execution of a task

CxState.name: Idle
CxState.Description: No material is present, the module is not executing a task, and no fault condition exists in the module that prevents it from starting a new task

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxTransition.name: 1a
CxTransition.Description: EPT Module initialization complete, a fault exists, or the EPT module cannot be initialized

CxTransition.name: 1b
CxTransition.Description: EPT Module initialization complete, a fault exists, or the EPT module cannot be initialized

CxTransition.name: 1c
CxTransition.Description: EPT Module initialization complete, no fault exists, and material is present
EPT Module starts execution of a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: EPT SM module state change

CxTransition.Description: EPT Module completes execution of a task and material is removed from the EPT Module

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: EPT Module starts execution of a new task upon the normal completion of the previous task. EPTStateTime and PreviousEPTStateTime do not change

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: A pause command is received that pauses the EPT module, an abort command is received that aborts the EPT module, or a fault condition occurs that prevents the EPT module from executing its task. TaskName and TaskType do not change

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: All fault conditions that prevented task execution are cleared and the EPT Module resumes execution of its tasks or starts execution of a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: All fault conditions that prevented task execution are cleared, all material is removed from the EPT module, and EPT Module can begin a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: Material arrives at the EPT Module and the EPT Module cannot begin executing a task on the material, or a fault condition occurs which prevents the EPTModule from starting a new task

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxTransition.Description: Fault conditions occur that prevent the EPT Module from resuming a blocked task, or starting a new task. EPTStateTime and PreviousEPTStateTime do not change

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxStateMachineInstance.name: EPTEquipmentInst
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Equipment Performance State Model for equipment

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: Triggered by a EPT State change at the EPT Module level

CxLogicalElement.name: JobManager
CxLogicalElement.Description: Non-structural element responsible for reporting all information related to jobs within the tool

CxParameter.name: CarrierInputSpec
CxParameter.Description: A list of carrierID for material that will be used by the ControlJob.

CxParameter.name: CtrlJobID
CxParameter.Description: The identifier of the control job

CxParameter.name: MtrlOutSpec
CxParameter.Description: Maps material from source to destination after processing.

CxParameter.name: PrevPRJobState
CxParameter.Description: Previous state of the job

CxParameter.name: PrevState
CxParameter.Description: Previous state of the ControlJob.

CxParameter.name: PRJobState
CxParameter.Description: State of the job

CxParameter.name: PRMtlNameList
CxParameter.Description: List of identifiers of the material being processed

CxParameter.name: PRMtlType
CxParameter.Description: The material type

CxParameter.name: PRRecipeMethod
CxParameter.Description: List of recipe variables

CxParameter.name: QueueAvailableSpace
CxParameter.Description: Indicates the number of jobs which the queue can accept. This parameter corresponds to the E94 QueueAvailableSpace SV

CxParameter.name: QueuedCJobs
CxParameter.Description: Ordered list of ControlJobs currently in the Queue

CxParameter.name: RecVariableList
CxParameter.Description: List of recipe variables

CxParameter.name: SetUpName
CxParameter.Description: Host sets this to define the operational condition of the equipment. This parameter corresponds to the E94 SetUpName EC

CxParameter.name: State
CxParameter.Description: Current state of the ControlJob. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob CJJobState attribute and the State DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

CxParameter.name: SubstID
CxParameter.Description: The identifier of the substrate that could not be processed due to the MtrlOutSpec

CxExceptionInst.Description: Substrate destination not accessible exception in job manager.

CxExceptionInst.name: SubstrateDestinationUnknown
CxExceptionInst.Description: Unknown substrate destination exception in job manager.

CxState.name: ProcessJob
CxState.Description: Process Job State Model

CxState.name: Active
CxState.Description: Parent state of all sub-states where the context of an active process job execution exists

CxState.name: Aborting
CxState.Description: The process resource is performing an abort or an optional recovery procedure

CxState.name: Executing
CxState.Description: Parent state of those sub-states that refer to the preparation and execution of a ProcessJob

CxState.name: Processing
CxState.Description: The processing resource is doing the actual material processing using the equipment recipe(s) specified by the PR Job

CxState.name: SettingUp
CxState.Description: The processing resource performs pre-conditioning, waits material arrival, and prepares for material processing

CxState.name: WaitingForStart
CxState.Description: Setup is complete and a PR Job Start Process has not yet been received by the processing resource

CxState.name: Pause
CxState.Description: The processing resource is suspending or has suspended activity

CxState.name: Paused
CxState.Description: All processing resource activity has ceased

CxState.name: Pausing
CxState.Description: The processing resource continues to the first safe, continuable place and then ceases activity

CxState.name: Stopping
CxState.Description: The processing resource is performing a stop procedure to terminate processing in an orderly manner

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: PostActive
CxState.Description: Parent state of those states that refer to the final (completion) of the ProcessJob

CxState.name: Aborted
CxState.Description: Final state for those jobs that have been in the Aborting State

CxState.name: ProcessComplete
CxState.Description: The processing resource has completed processing all material specified by the PR Job

CxState.name: Stopped
CxState.Description: Final state for those jobs that have been in the Stopping State

CxState.name: QueuedPooled
CxState.Description: The ProcessJob has been accepted by the processing resource through a PR Job Create/Acknowledge transaction and is awaiting execution

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource accepts a ProcessJob create request. The job is added to the job queue/pool

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm1
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource accepts a ProcessJob create request

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource resumed the job and the job was being setup prior to the pause

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm10
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource resumed the job and the job was being setup prior to the pause

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource initiated a process stop action. Material processing continues until the first convenient stop point is reached

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm11
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource initiated a process stop action

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource initiated a process stop action. Material processing continues until the first convenient stop point is reached

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm12
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource initiated a process stop action

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource initiated a process abort action. The processing activity terminates immediately

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm13
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource initiated a process abort action

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource initiated a process abort action. The processing activity terminates immediately

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm14
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource initiated a process abort action

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource initiated a process abort action. The processing activity terminates immediately

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm15
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource initiated a process abort action

CxTransition.Description: The abort procedure is completed

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm16
CxEvent.Description: The abort procedure is completed

CxTransition.Description: The stop procedure is completed

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm17
CxEvent.Description: The stop procedure is completed

CxTransition.Description: Cancel, Abort, or Stop command received. ProcessJob is removed from the queue/pool

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm18
CxEvent.Description: Cancel, Abort, or Stop command received

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource has been allocated to the ProcessJob. The job is removed from the job queue/pool and preconditioning begins

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm2
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource has been allocated to the ProcessJob

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|7|PJ_tsm2|1|34|Process Job QUEUED/POOLED state to SETTING UP state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|400201|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Job material is present and processing resource is ready to start the process job and PRProcessStart attribute is not set (false)

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm3
CxEvent.Description: Job material is present and processing resource is ready to start the ProcessJob and PRProcessStart attribute is not set

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|7|PJ_tsm3|1|38|Process Job SETTING UP state to WAITING FOR START state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|400202|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Material is present and ready for processing, and PRProcessStart attribute is set (true)

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm4
CxEvent.Description: Material is present and ready for processing. PRProcessStart attribute is set

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|7|PJ_tsm4|1|31|Process Job SETTING UP state to PROCESSING state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|400203|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Job start directive

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm5
CxEvent.Description: Job start directive

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|7|PJ_tsm5|1|38|Process Job WAITING FOR START state to PROCESSING state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|400204|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Material processing complete. Any post conditioning begins

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm6
CxEvent.Description: Material processing complete

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|7|PJ_tsm6|1|37|Process Job PROCESSING state to PROCESS COMPLETE state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|400205|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Job material departs from the equipment or the ProcessJjob becomes extinct because the ProcessJob is replaced by another ProcessJob that specifies the same material when no control job is used. ProcessJob is deleted

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm7
CxEvent.Description: Job material departs from the equipment or the ProcessJob becomes extinct because the ProcessJob is replaced by another ProcessJob that specifies the same material when no control job is used

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|7|PJ_tsm7|1|2f|Process Job PROCESS COMPLETE state to No State.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|400206|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource initiated a process pause action. Material processing continues until the first convenient pause point is reached

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm8
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource initiated a process pause action

CxTransition.Description: The processing resource paused the job

CxEvent.name: PJ_tsm9
CxEvent.Description: The processing resource paused the job

CxState.name: ControlJob
CxState.Description: ControlJob State Model

CxState.name: Active
CxState.Description: ControlJob is active on the equipment

CxState.name: Executing
CxState.Description: Each ProcessJob in the ProcessingCtrlSpec is initiated in order, based on the value of the ControlJob's ProcessOrderMgmt attribute as resources become available and materials arrive

CxState.name: Paused
CxState.Description: ControlJob shall not commence the initiation of any more ProcessJobs

CxState.name: Selected
CxState.Description: ControlJob does not initiate ProcessJobs specific in it, the processing resource is reserved to the ControlJob

CxState.name: WaitingForStart
CxState.Description: ControlJob is waiting to receive a Start command manually or remotely from the host

CxState.name: Completed
CxState.Description: All ProcessJobs have been completed, stopped, or aborted

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: Queued
CxState.Description: ControlJob is queued

CxTransition.Description: Receive Create command from host or operator through operator console. ControlJob is created and placed at the end of the queue

CxEvent.name: E94_NoState2Queued
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been created and transitioned to QUEUED state.

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|12|E94_NoState2Queued|1|3e|Control Job has been created and transitioned to QUEUED state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|940100|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: All the ProcessJobs specified for the ControlJob have completed

CxEvent.name: E94_Executing2Completed
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been completed.

CxTransition.Description: Equipment received a CJStop command from the host or operator or generated a CJStop internally, and all ProcessJobs under the ControlJob that were Active when the CJStop command was received have entered the PostActive state

CxEvent.name: E94_Active2Completed_Stopped
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been stopped.

CxTransition.Description: Equipment received a CJAbort command from the host or operator or generated a CJAbort internally, and all ProcessJobs under the ControlJob that were Active when the CJAbort command was received have entered the PostActive state

CxEvent.name: E94_Active2Completed_Aborted
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been aborted.

CxTransition.Description: ControlJob is deleted

CxEvent.name: E94_Completed2NoState
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been deleted.

CxTransition.Description: Receive Cancel, Abort, or Stop command from host or operator through operator console. ControlJob is removed from the queue and deleted

CxEvent.name: E94_Queued2NoState
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been canceled and deleted

CxTransition.Description: Processing resource has capacity to begin work on the next ControlJob. Job at the head of the queue is dequeued and selected

CxEvent.name: E94_Queued2Selected
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to SELECTED state.

CxTransition.Description: Receive De-select command from host or operator through operator console and materials for the ControlJob have not arrived yet

CxEvent.name: E94_Selected2Queued
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been deselected and transitioned to QUEUED state.

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|13|E94_Selected2Queued|1|41|Control Job has been deselected and transitioned to QUEUED state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|940103|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Material for the first ProcessJob arrives or in the case where the first ProcessJob does not require material, this transition shall be taken as soon as the processing resource for that ProcessJob becomes available, and StartMethod is set for Auto

CxEvent.name: E94_Selected2Executing
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to EXECUTING state.

CxTransition.Description: Material for the first ProcessJob arrives or in the case where the first ProcessJob does not require material, this transition shall be taken as soon as the processing resource for that ProcessJob becomes available, and StartMethod is set for user start

CxEvent.name: E94_Selected2WaitingForStart
CxEvent.Description: Control Job is waiting for START event.

CxTransition.Description: User Start command received

CxEvent.name: E94_WaitingForStart2Executing
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to EXECUTING state.

CxTransition.Description: Received Pause command from host or operator, or a ControlJob PauseEvent has occurred

CxEvent.name: E94_Executing2Paused
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to PAUSED state.

CxTransition.Description: Received Resume command from host or operator

CxEvent.name: E94_Paused2Executing
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been resumed and transitioned to EXECUTING state.

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|14|E94_Paused2Executing|1|41|Control Job has been resumed and transitioned to EXECUTING state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|940108|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxSEMIObjType.name: ControlJob
CxSEMIObjType.Description: Job Manager's Control Job SEMI object.

Attribute.name: CarrierInputSpec
Attribute.Description: A list of carrierID for material that will be used by the ControlJob. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob CarrierInputSpec attribute and the CarrierInputSpec DV is unnecessary because EDA allows attributes in reports

Attribute.name: CurrentPRJob
Attribute.Description: Holds the identifiers of any ProcessJobs in the active state. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob CurrentPRJob attribute and the CurrentPRJob DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: DataCollectionPlan
Attribute.Description: Identifier for the data collection plan to be used during the execution of the ControlJob. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob DataCollectionPlan attribute and the DataCollectionPlan DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: MtrlOutByStatus
Attribute.Description: List structure which maps locations or Carriers where processed material will be placed based on material status. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob MtrlOutByStatus attribute and the MtrlOutByStatus DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: MtrlOutSpec
Attribute.Description: Maps material from source to destination after processing. In slot integrity mode the list shall be empty. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob MtrlOutSpec attribute and the MtrlOutSpec DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ObjID
Attribute.Description: Host defined identifier of the ControlJob. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob ObjID attribute and the CtrlJobID DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ObjType
Attribute.Description: This parameter corresponds to the ObjType attribute of the E94 ControlJob object.

Attribute.name: PauseEvent
Attribute.Description: Identifier of a list of events on which the ControlJob shall Pause. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob PauseEvent attribute and the PauseEvent DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: PRJobStatusList
Attribute.Description: A list of all ProcessJobs managed by the ControlJob and their associated status. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob PRJobStatusList attribute and the PRJobStatusList DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ProcessingCtrlSpec
Attribute.Description: A list of structures that defines the ProcessJobs and rules for running each that will be run within this ControlJob. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob ProcessingCtrlSpec attribute and the ProcessingCtrlSpec DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ProcessOrderMgmt
Attribute.Description: Define the method for the order in which ProcessJobs are initiated. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob ProcessOrderMgmt attribute and the ProcessOrderMgmt DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: StartMethod
Attribute.Description: A logical flag that determines if the ControlJob can start automatically (true) or must be started by the user (false). This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob StartMethod attribute and the StartMethod DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: State
Attribute.Description: Current state of the ControlJob. This parameter merges the E94 ControlJob CJJobState attribute and the State DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

CxParameter.name: ControlJobCurrState
CxParameter.Description: The control job's current state

CxParameter.name: ControlJobPrevState
CxParameter.Description: The control job's previous state

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E94CJMInst
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: E94CJMInst desc

CxEvent.name: E94_Active2Completed_Aborted
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been aborted.

CxEvent.name: E94_Active2Completed_Stopped
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been stopped.

CxEvent.name: E94_Completed2NoState
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been deleted.

CxEvent.name: E94_Executing2Completed
CxEvent.Description: The Control Job has been completed.

CxEvent.name: E94_Executing2Paused
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to PAUSED state.

CxEvent.name: E94_NoState2Queued
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been created and transitioned to QUEUED state.

CxEvent.name: E94_Paused2Executing
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been resumed and transitioned to EXECUTING state.

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|14|E94_Paused2Executing|1|41|Control Job has been resumed and transitioned to EXECUTING state.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|940108|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxEvent.name: E94_Queued2NoState
CxEvent.Description: Control Job has been canceled and deleted

CxEvent.name: E94_Queued2Selected
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to SELECTED state.

CxEvent.name: E94_Selected2Executing
CxEvent.Description: Control Job transitioned to EXECUTING state.

Attribute.name: ObjID
Attribute.Description: An identifier for the service user. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob ObjID attribute and the PRJobID DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ObjType
Attribute.Description: This parameter corresponds to the ObjType attribute of the E40 ProcessJob object.

Attribute.name: PauseEvent
Attribute.Description: List of event identifiers that cause the equipment to automatically transition to the Pausing/Paused states when one of the listed events is triggered. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob PauseEvent attribute and the PauseEvent DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: PRJobState
Attribute.Description: A unique sub-state of the job according to the ProcessJob state model. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob PRJobState attribute and the PRJobState DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: PRMtlNameList
Attribute.Description: List of identifiers of the material being processed. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob PRMtlNameList attribute and the PRMtlNameList DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: PRMtlType
Attribute.Description: Identifies the type of material being processed. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob PRMtlType attribute and the PRMtlType DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: PRProcessStart
Attribute.Description: Indicates if the processing resource starts processing immediately when ready (true) or must be started manually (false). This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob PRProcessState attribute and the PRProcessStart DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: PRRecipeMethod
Attribute.Description: Indication of recipe specification type, whether using is applied and which method is used. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob PRRecipeMethod attribute and the PRRecipeMethod DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: RecID
Attribute.Description: Identifier of the recipe applied. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob RecID attribute - the RecID DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: RecVariableList
Attribute.Description: List of variables supporting a recipe method. This parameter merges the E40 ProcessJob RecipeVariableList attribute and the RecVariableList DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

CxParameterType.name: CarrierInputSpecArray
CxParameterType.Description: Array of Carriers associated with the Control Job

CxParameterType.name: CJStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: ControlJob state.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Queued - ControlJob is queued (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Selected - ControlJob does not initiate ProcessJobs specific in it, the processing resource is reserved to the ControlJob (corresponds to SECS value 1)
WaitingForStart - ControlJob is waiting to receive a Start command manually or remotely from the host (corresponds to SECS value 2)

Executing - Each ProcessJob in the ProcessingCtrlSpec is initiated in order, based on the value of the ControlJob's ProcessOrderMgmt attribute as resources become available and materials arrive (corresponds to SECS value 3)
Paused - ControlJob shall not commence the initiation of any more ProcessJobs (corresponds to SECS value 4)
Completed - All ProcessJobs have been completed, stopped, or aborted (corresponds to SECS value 5)

CxParameterType.Description: Structure that defines the ProcessJob and rules for running it within this ControlJob

Field.name: PRJobID
Field.Description: ProcessJob Identifier

Field.name: ControlRule
Field.Description: Defines additional job control functionality

Field.name: OutputRule
Field.Description: Defines the material status based on the results of the ProcessJob

CxParameterType.name: PRJobStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: A unique sub-state of the job according to the ProcessJob state model.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: QueuedPooled - The ProcessJob has been accepted by the processing resource through a PR Job Create/Achnowledge transaction and is awaiting execution (corresponds to SECS value 0)
SettingUp - The processing resource performs pre-conditioning, waits material arrival, and prepares for material processing (corresponds to SECS value 1)
WaitingForStart - Setup is complete and a PR Job Start Process has not yet been received by the processing resource (corresponds to SECS value 2)
Processing - The processing resource is doing the actual material processing using the equipment recipe(s) specified by the PR Job (corresponds to SECS value 3)
ProcessComplete - The processing resource has completed processing all material specified by the PR Job (corresponds to SECS value 4)
Pausing - The processing resource continues to the first safe, continuable place and then ceases activity (corresponds to SECS value 6)
Paused - All processing resource activity has ceased (corresponds to SECS value 7)
Stopping - The processing resource is performing a stop procedure to terminate processing in an orderly manner (corresponds to SECS value 8)
Aborting - The process resource is performing an abort or an optional recovery procedure (corresponds to SECS value 9)
Stopped - Final state for those jobs that have been in the Stopping State (corresponds to SECS value 10)
Aborted - Final state for those jobs that have been in the Aborting State (corresponds to SECS value 11)

CxParameterType.name: PRJobStatus
CxParameterType.Description: ProcessJob and its current state

Field.name: PRJobID
Field.Description: ProcessJob Identifier

Field.name: PRJobState
Field.Description: Current ProcessJob state

CxParameterType.name: PRJobStatusArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of all ProcessJobs managed by this ControlJob and their current states

CxParameterType.name: PRMtlCarrierNameArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of identifiers of the carriers and slots being processed

CxParameterType.name: PRMtlNameArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of identifiers of the material being processed

CxParameterType.name: PRMtlSubstrateNameArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of identifiers of the substrates being processed

CxParameterType.name: PRMtlTypeEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Identifies the type of material being processed.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Quantities in wafers (corresponds to SECS value 1-Wafers)
Quantities in cassette (corresponds to SECS value 2-Cassette)
Quantities in die or chips (corresponds to SECS value 3-DieOrChips)
Quantities in boats (corresponds to SECS value 4-Boats)
Quantities in ingots (corresponds to SECS value 5-Ingots)
Quantities in leadframes (corresponds to SECS value 6-Leadframes)
Quantities in lots (corresponds to SECS value 7-Lots)
Quantities in magazines (corresponds to SECS value 8-Magazines)
Quantities in packages (corresponds to SECS value 9-Packages)
Quantities in plates (corresponds to SECS value 10-Plates)
Quantities in tubes (corresponds to SECS value 11-Tubes)
Quantities in waterframes (corresponds to SECS value 12-Waterframes)
Carrier - Material selected by Carrier ID and slots (corresponds to SECS value 13)
Substrate - Material selected by Substrate ID (corresponds to SECS value 14)

CxParameterType.name: ProcessingCtrlSpecArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of structures that defines the ProcessJobs and rules for running each that will be run within this Control\Job

CxParameterType.name: ProcessOrderMgmtEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Defines the method for the order in which ProcessJobs are initiated.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Arrival - ProcessJobs shall be initiated as the material for the job arrives (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Optimized - ProcessJobs shall be initialized in an order determined by internal equipment algorithms, that optimize the throughput of material in the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 2)
List - ProcessJobs shall be initiated in the order of the list in ProcessingCtrlSpec (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: PRRecipeMethodEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Indication of recipe specification type, whether using is applied and which method is used.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: RecipeOnly - Only values defined within the recipe will be used (corresponds to SECS value 1)
RecipeWithVariableTuning - Recipe tuning variables will be tuned by specified recipe variable list (corresponds to SECS value 2)

CxParameterType.name: QueuedCJobsArray
CxParameterType.Description: Array of process jobs in the process job queue

CxLogicalElement.name: MaterialManager
CxLogicalElement.Description: Non-structural element responsible for reporting all information related to material within the tool
