CxStateMachine.name: E87LPCASM
CxStateMachine.Description: Load Port / Carrier Association State Model

CxState.name: LoadPortCarrierAssociation
CxState.Description: Load Port / Carrier Association State Model

CxState.name: Associated
CxState.Description: Carrier has been associated with the Load Port

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: NotAssociated
CxState.Description: No carrier association present for the Load Port

CxTransition.Description: System initialized

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2NotAssociated
CxEvent.Description: System initialized

CxTransition.Description: Host sends a Bind when the port is unoccupied, carrier created because the host sends either a ProceedWithCarrier or CancelCarrier, a Carrier ID that does not currently exist at the equipment is successfully read, or a known carrier to the equipment is being moved onto the load port from an internal location

CxEvent.name: E87NotAssociated2Associated
CxEvent.Description: Host sends a Bind when the port is unoccupied, carrier created because the host sends either a ProceedWithCarrier or CancelCarrier, Carrier ID not currently existing at the equipment successfully read, or a known carrier to the equipment is being moved onto the load port from an internal location

CxTransition.Description: Host sends a CancelBind to the equipment before the carrier arrives or before a transfer sequence has started, or carrier is removed from the load port externally or to an internal buffer position

CxEvent.name: E87Associated2NotAssociated
CxEvent.Description: Host sends a CancelBind to the equipment before the carrier arrives or before a transfer sequence has started, or carrier is removed from the load port externally or to an internal buffer position

CxTransition.Description: Equipment based verification fails and the carrier assumes the ID value from the carrier that is on the load port, or a carrier is unloaded and a queued CarrierOut service starts. The existing carrierID that was associated by a Bind service is unassociated and the new carrierID is now associated to the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87Associated2Associated
CxEvent.Description: Equipment based verification fails and the carrier assumes the ID value from the carrier that is on the load port, or a carrier is unloaded and a queued CarrierOut service starts. The existing carrierID that was associated by a Bind service is unassociated and the new carrierID is now associated to the Load Port

CxState.name: LoadPortReservation
CxState.Description: Load Port Reservation State Model

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: NotReserved
CxState.Description: No reservation exists for the load port

CxState.name: Reserved
CxState.Description: No reservation exists for the load port

CxTransition.Description: System initialized
Host or operator sends a ReserveAtPort or Bind to the equipment, or a CarrierOut occurs on the equipment

CxEvent.name: E87NotReserved2Reserved
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator sends a ReserveAtPort or Bind to the equipment, or a CarrierOut occurs on the equipment

CxTransition.Description: Host or operator sends a CancelBind or a CancelReservationAtPort, or a carrier arrives at the reserved port

CxEvent.name: E87Reserved2NotReserved
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator sends a CancelBind or a CancelReservationAtPort, or a carrier arrives at the reserved port

CxState.name: LoadPortTransfer
CxState.Description: Load Port Transfer State Model

CxState.name: InService
CxState.Description: Carrier transfer at this port is enabled

CxState.name: TransferBlocked
CxState.Description: Load port related activity being performed, transfer is not available to/from this load port at this time

CxState.name: TransferReady
CxState.Description: Load port is available for carrier transfer

CxState.name: ReadyToLoad
CxState.Description: Load port is available to be loaded with an external carrier, or with a carrier that is currently located inside the equipment

CxState.name: ReadyToUnload
CxState.Description: Load port is available for unloading of a carrier from the Load Port to material handling equipment

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: OutOfService
CxState.Description: Transfer to/from this load port is disabled

CxTransition.Description: Transfer was unsuccessful and the carrier has not loaded or unloaded

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2TransferReady
CxEvent.Description: Transfer was unsuccessful and the carrier has not loaded or unloaded

CxTransition.name: 1a
CxTransition.Description: System reset, prior state was out of service

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2OutOfService
CxEvent.Description: System reset, prior state was out of service

CxTransition.name: 1b
CxTransition.Description: System reset, prior state was in service

CxEvent.name: E87NoState2InService
CxEvent.Description: System reset, prior state was in service

CxTransition.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of The load port is usable for transfers

CxEvent.name: E87OutOfService2InService
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of OutOfService

CxTransition.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of OutOfService. The load port is unusable for transfers

CxEvent.name: E87InService2OutOfService
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceState service for this load port with a value of InService

CxTransition.name: 4a
CxTransition.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset, and the load port is currently available for transfers

CxEvent.name: E87InService2TransferReady
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port or system was reset

CxTransition.name: 4b
CxTransition.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset, and the load port is not currently available for carrier transfer

CxEvent.name: E87InService2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset, and the load port is not currently available for carrier transfer

CxTransition.name: 5a
CxTransition.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and no carrier is present on the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferReady2ReadyToLoad
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and no carrier is present on the Load Port

CxTransition.name: 5b
CxTransition.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and a carrier is present on the Load Port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferReady2ReadyToUnload
CxEvent.Description: Host or operator has invoked the ChangeServiceStatus service for this load port with a value of InService or system was reset or a transfer failed, and a carrier is present on the Load Port

CxTransition.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual load transfer, an automated PIO load transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, or a CarrierOut service is started for this load port

CxEvent.name: E87ReadyToLoad2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual load transfer, an automated PIO load transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, or a CarrierOut service is started for this load port

CxTransition.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual unload transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer is beginning and the PIO READY signal is active, a CarrierIn service is started for this load port, or a CarrierReCreate service has been issued by the host or operator

CxEvent.name: E87ReadyToUnload2TransferBlocked
CxEvent.Description: Equipment recognizes the logical indication of the start of a manual unload transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer is beginning and the PIO Ready signal is active, a CarrierIn service is started for this load port, or a CarrierReCreate service has been issued by the host or operator

CxTransition.Description: Manual carrier unload transfer has completed and the Load Port is now empty and ready for load transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer ends with the PIO COMPT signal, or the carrier has finished its move from the load port into the internal buffer and no CarrierOut services are queued for this load port

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2ReadytoLoad
CxEvent.Description: Manual carrier unload transfer has completed and the Load Port is now empty and ready for load transfer, an automated PIO unload transfer ends with the PIO Compt signal, or the carrier has finished its move from the load port into the internal buffer and no CarrierOut services are queued for this load port

CxTransition.Description: Processing for substrates contained with the carrier has complete or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been issued, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position on the load port while in Manual; Processing for the substrates belonging to the carrier has completed, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been received, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position while in Automatic

CxEvent.name: E87TransferBlocked2ReadytoUnload
CxEvent.Description: Processing for substrates contained with the carrier has complete, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been issued, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position on the load port while in Manual; Processing for the substrates belonging to the carrier has completed, or a CancelCarrier/CancelCarrierAtPort service has been received, and the carrier has returned to the load/unload position while in Automatic

CxState.name: SubstrateLocation
CxState.Description: Substrate Location State Model

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Default state for initial/final states

CxState.name: Occupied
CxState.Description: The state in which the substrate location holds a substrate

CxState.name: Unoccupied
CxState.Description: The state in which the substrate location does not hold or have a substrate

CxTransition.name: 0a
CxTransition.Description: Substrate location is initialized without a substrate in the location

CxEvent.name: NoState2Unoccupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate location is initialized without a substrate in the location

CxTransition.name: 0b
CxTransition.Description: Substrate location is initialized with a substrate in the location

CxEvent.name: NoState2Occupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate location is initialized without a substrate in the location

CxTransition.Description: Substrate moves into the substrate location. A record is created in the SubstHistory for the Substrate placed in the location.

CxEvent.name: E90_Loc_Unoccupied2Occupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate moves onto the substrate location

CxTransition.Description: Substrate moves off the location. TimeOut in SubstHistory is updated

CxEvent.name: E90_Loc_Occupied2Unoccupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate moves off the location

CxState.name: SubstrateObject
CxState.Description: Substrate Object State Model

CxState.name: AnyState
CxState.Description: State description

CxState.name: Extinction
CxState.Description: State description

CxState.name: NoState
CxState.Description: Pseudo state of the carrier prior to creation or after destruction

CxState.name: Substrate
CxState.Description: Substrate object exists

CxState.name: SubstrateProcessing
CxState.Description: Substrate Processing State Model

CxState.name: InProcess
CxState.Description: Substrate is being processed

CxState.name: NeedsProcessing
CxState.Description: Processing requirements exist that have not yet been fulfilled

CxState.name: ProcessingComplete
CxState.Description: Substrate has completed all processing associated with a recipe specification

CxState.name: Aborted
CxState.Description: The process has been aborted during the processing

CxState.name: Lost
CxState.Description: Substrate has been broken and/or removed from the equipment by an external entity and it no longer exists at the equipment

CxState.name: Processed
CxState.Description: All Substrate processing has successfully completed

CxState.name: Rejected
CxState.Description: Substrate has been processed completely, however, the result of processing may have a problem

CxState.name: Skipped
CxState.Description: As directed by an operator or host, the substrate was not processed

CxState.name: Stopped
CxState.Description: The process has been stopped during the processing

CxState.name: SubstrateProcessing:NoState
CxState.Description: Pseudo state of the carrier prior to creation or after destruction

CxTransition.Description: Substrate object is created

CxEvent.name: E90_Subst_NoState2NeedsProcessing
CxEvent.Description: The substrate object is created

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|21|E90_Subst_NoState2NeedsProcessing|1|8d|The substrate object is created. The xxxList DVs are only updated during carrier arrival and removal when substrates are created and deleted.|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|900109|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Substrate starts actual processing

CxEvent.name: E90_Subst_NeedsProcessing2InProcess
CxEvent.Description: The processing to the substrate starts

CxTransition.Description: Transition description

CxEvent.name: E90_Subst_InProcess2ProcessingComplete
CxEvent.Description: The processing to the substrate completes

CxTransition.name: 12a
CxTransition.Description: Processing completes normally

CxTransition.name: 12b
CxTransition.Description: Process completes, but a problem may exist

CxTransition.name: 12c
CxTransition.Description: Processing was stopped

CxTransition.name: 12d
CxTransition.Description: Processing was aborted

CxTransition.name: 12e
CxTransition.Description: Substrate was lost during processing

CxTransition.name: 12f
CxTransition.Description: Processing was skipped
The process associated with the processing instructions was completed and the substrate is to be processed again

CxEvent.name: E90_Subst_InProcess2NeedsProcessing
CxEvent.Description: The substrate is requested to be processed again

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|23|E90_Subst_InProcess2NeedsProcessing|1|30|The substrate is requested to be processed again|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||0||0||0|0||0||1|0||6|900112|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxTransition.Description: Transition description

CxEvent.name: E90_Subst_NeedsProcessing2ProcessingComplete
CxEvent.Description: The substrate is lost or skipped

CxTransition.name: 14a
CxTransition.Description: Substrate has been removed from the equipment by an external agent or is physically missing

CxTransition.name: 14b
CxTransition.Description: Substrate has been skipped and not processed

CxState.name: SubstrateReadingStatus
CxState.Description: Substrate Reading Status State Model

CxState.name: ConfirmationFailed
CxState.Description: Host decides to cancel the substrate

CxState.name: Confirmed
CxState.Description: Substrate ID has been confirmed by the equipment or the host after it was read

CxState.name: NotConfirmed
CxState.Description: The substrate identifier has not been confirmed

CxState.name: SubstrateReadingStatus:NoState
CxState.Description: Pseudo state of the carrier prior to creation or after destruction

CxState.name: WaitingForHost
CxState.Description: Substrate ID could not be identified by the reader, was discovered to be at a wrong source location, or no matching ID in the source set

CxTransition.Description: Substrate object is created
Substrate was successfully read and SubstID provided in the ContentMap matched the AcquiredID read by the equipment

CxTransition.Description: Equipment has received a ProceedWithSubstrate

CxEvent.name: E90_ID_WaitingForHost2Confirmed
CxEvent.Description: Equipment has received a ProceedWithSubstrate service

CxTransition.Description: Equipment has received a CancelSubstrate

CxEvent.name: E90_ID_WaitingForHost2ConfirmationFailed
CxEvent.Description: Equipment has received a CancelSubstrate service

CxState.name: SubstrateTransport
CxState.Description: Substrate Transport State Model

CxState.name: AtDestination
CxState.Description: Substrate has been placed at its designated destination substrate location

CxState.name: AtSource
CxState.Description: Substrate is at the original location it was received

CxState.name: AtWork
CxState.Description: Substrate has been taken from the original substrate location, and is traveling on intermediate equipment substrate locations

CxState.name: SubstrateTransport:NoState
CxState.Description: Pseudo state of the carrier prior to creation or after destruction

CxEvent.name: CarrierApproachingComplete
CxEvent.Description: Occurs when the equipment determines access to the carrier is nearing completion

CxEvent.name: CarrierLocationChange
CxEvent.Description: Carrier has changed locations within the equipment

Attribute.name: Capacity
Attribute.Description: Maximum number of substrates a carrier can hold. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier Capacity attribute and the Capacity DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: CarrierAccessingStatus
Attribute.Description: Current accessing state of the carrier by the equipment. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier CarrierAccessingStatus attribute and the CarrierAccessingStatus DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: CarrierIDStatus
Attribute.Description: Current state of the Carrier ID verification. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier CarrierIDStatus attribute and the CarrierIDStatus DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ContentMap
Attribute.Description: Ordered list of lot and substrate identifiers corresponding to slot 1,2,3,...n. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier ContentMap attribute and the ContentMap DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: LocationID
Attribute.Description: Identifier of the current location. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier LocationID attribute and the LocationID DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ObjID
Attribute.Description: Object identifier of the Carrier object. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier ObjID attribute and the CarrierID DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: ObjType
Attribute.Description: This parameter corresponds to the ObjType attribute of the E87 Carrier object.

Attribute.name: SlotMap
Attribute.Description: Ordered list of slot status corresponding to slot 1,2,3,...n. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier SlotMap attribute and the SlotMap DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: SlotMapStatus
Attribute.Description: Current state of slot map verification. This parameter merges the E87 Carrier SlotMapStatus attribute and the SlotMapStatus DV (since EDA allows attributes in reports)

Attribute.name: SubstrateCount
Attribute.Description: Number of substrates currently in the carrier. This parameter represents the E87 Carrier SubstrateCount attribute.

Attribute.name: Usage
Attribute.Description: Type of material contained in the carrier. This parameter represents the E87 Carrier Usage attribute.

CxParameter.name: CarrierAccessingStatusCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the CarrierAccessingStatus state machine. This value matches the CarrierAccessingStatus with the exception of NoState

CxParameter.name: CarrierAccessingStatusPrevState
CxParameter.Description: Previous carrier accessing state

CxParameter.name: CarrierIDStatusCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the CarrierIDStatus state machine. This value matches the CarrierIDStatus with the exception of NoState

CxParameter.name: CarrierIDStatusPrevState
CxParameter.Description: Previous carrier ID verification state

CxParameter.name: CarrierSlotMapStatusCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the CarrierSlotMapStatus state machine. This value matches the SlotMapStatus with the exception of NoState

CxParameter.name: CarrierSlotMapStatusPrevState
CxParameter.Description: Previous carrier slot map verification state

CxParameter.name: Reason
CxParameter.Description: The reason for transition 14, SlotMapNotRead to WaitingForHost. This parameter represents the E87 Reason DV.

CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Carrier object state model for equipment

Attribute.name: DisableEvents
Attribute.Description: Indicates if the transitions for this substrate location either generate (false) or do not generate (true) events to the host.

Attribute.name: ObjID
Attribute.Description: Object identifier of the SubstLoc object.

Attribute.name: ObjType
Attribute.Description: This parameter corresponds to the ObjType attribute of the E90 SubstLoc object.

Attribute.name: SubstID
Attribute.Description: Substrate identifier relevant to the location.

Attribute.name: SubstLocState
Attribute.Description: Substrate location state for the location.

CxParameter.name: MaterialID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the material in the location. This is a generic parameter defined for all material locations and will provide the same value as SubstID

CxParameter.name: SubstrateLocationCurrState

CxEvent.Description: Substrate moves off the location

CxEvent.Description: Substrate moves onto the substrate location

Attribute.name: AcquiredID
Attribute.Description: Contains the ID read from the substrate (Empty string before the substrate is read).

Attribute.name: BatchLocID
Attribute.Description: Identifier for current batch location.

Attribute.name: LotID
Attribute.Description: Identifier of the lot associated with the substrate by the user.

Attribute.name: MaterialStatus
Attribute.Description: Current status of the substrate that represents criteria of the processing quality.

Attribute.name: ObjID
Attribute.Description: The ObjID provides the identifier for a substrate object instance and the AcquiredID provides the id read directly from the substrate after the tool performs the read

Attribute.name: ObjType
Attribute.Description: This parameter corresponds to the ObjType attribute of the E90 Substrate object.

Attribute.name: SubstDestination
Attribute.Description: Identifier of the substrate location on which the substrate shall be finally restored.

Attribute.name: SubstHistory
Attribute.Description: History of locations visited.

Attribute.name: SubstIDStatus
Attribute.Description: Status of the substrate ID read.

Attribute.name: SubstLocID
Attribute.Description: Identifier for current equipment substrate location or carrier substrate location that the substrate occupies.

Attribute.name: SubstPosInBatch
Attribute.Description: Current substrate position in a batch.

Attribute.name: SubstProcState
Attribute.Description: Processing state of the substrate.

Attribute.name: SubstSource
Attribute.Description: Identifier of the substrate location on which the substrate has been initially registered.

Attribute.name: SubstState
Attribute.Description: Transport state of the substrate.

Attribute.name: SubstType
Attribute.Description: The type of the substrate.

Attribute.name: SubstUsage
Attribute.Description: How the substrate is used.

CxParameterType.name: AccessModeEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Access mode for a load port. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Manual - Only manual (non-AMHS) carrier transfers are allowed (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Auto - Only automated (AMHS) carrier transfers are allowed (corresponds to SECS value 1)

CxParameterType.name: CarrierAccessingStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Accessing state of the carrier by the equipment. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: NotAccessed - Access by the equipment has not been started (corresponds to SECS value 0)
InAccess - Access by the equipment to the carrier has been started but has not been finished (corresponds to SECS value 1)
CarrierComplete - Access by the equipment to the carrier has been finished (corresponds to SECS value 2)
CarrierStopped - Access by the equipment to the carrier has been stopped abnormally (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: CarrierIDStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Carrier ID verification status. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: IDNotRead - CarrierID has not been read by the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 0)
WaitingForHost - CarrierID has been read by the equipment successfully or unsuccessfully and has not yet been verified by the host (corresponds to SECS value 1)

IDVerificationOk - CarrierID has been accepted either by successful verification by the equipment or the host, or by bypassing ID read because a carrier ID reader is not available and the BypassReadID variable is set to true (corresponds to SECS value 2)
IDVerificationFailed - CarrierID has failed verification by the host (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: CarrierLocationMatrixArray
CxParameterType.Description: A list of all carriers at/in the equipment

CxParameterType.name: CarrierLocationMatrixEntry
CxParameterType.Description: Carrier identifier and location

Field.name: LocationID
Field.Description: Identifier of the location the carrier is at

Field.name: CarrierID
Field.Description: Identifier of the carrier

CxParameterType.name: CarrierSlotStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Status of a carrier slot.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Undefined - The state of the slot is not known (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Empty - The slot is empty (corresponds to SECS value 1)
NotEmpty - The slot is not empty (may be correctly or incorrectly occupied) (corresponds to SECS value 2)
CorrectlyOccupied - The slot has a properly positioned substrate (corresponds to SECS value 3)
DoubleSlotted - The slot has more than one substrate present (corresponds to SECS value 4)
CrossSlotted - The slot is cross slotted with another slot in the carrier (corresponds to SECS value 5)

CxParameterType.name: ContentMapArray
CxParameterType.Description: Ordered list of lot and substrate IDs corresponding to slot 1,2,3,...,n

CxParameterType.name: ContentMapEntry
CxParameterType.Description: Lot and substrate identifier for a slot

Field.name: LotID
Field.Description: Lot the substrate is associated with (null if unknown or no substrate present)

Field.name: SubstrateID
Field.Description: Identifier of the substrate in the slot (null if no substrate present)

CxParameterType.name: LoadPortReservationStateArray
CxParameterType.Description: Reservation state of all load ports

CxParameterType.name: LoadPortReservationStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Reservation state for a load port. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: NotReserved - No reservation exists for the load port (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Reserved - A reservation for future activity at the load port exists (corresponds to SECS value 1)

CxParameterType.name: LocationStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Material Location state enumeration

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Unoccupied - Material location does not hold or have any material
Occupied - Material location holds material

CxParameterType.name: MaterialStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Defines the material status values supported by the equipment

EnumeratedInteger.Description: The Material Status enumeration values are equipment specific and must be defined by the supplier
The Material Status enumeration values are equipment specific and must be defined by the supplier

CxParameterType.name: PortAssociationStateArray
CxParameterType.Description: Association state for all load ports

CxParameterType.name: PortAssociationStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Association state of a Load Port. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: NotAssociated - No carrier association present for the Load Port (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Associated - Carrier has been associated with the Load Port (corresponds to SECS value 1)

CxParameterType.name: PortStateInfo
CxParameterType.Description: PortAssociationState combined with the PortAssociationState for a load port

Field.name: PortAssociationState
Field.Description: The association state of the load port

Field.name: PortTransferState
Field.Description: Transfer state of the load port

CxParameterType.name: PortTransferStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Transfer state of a load port. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: OutOfService - Transfer to/from this load port is disabled (corresponds to SECS value 0)
TransferBlocked - Load port related activity being performed, transfer is not available to/from this load port at this time (corresponds to SECS value 1)
ReadyToLoad - Load port is available to be loaded with an external carrier, or with a carrier that is currently located inside the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 2)
ReadyToUnload - Load port is available for unloading of a carrier from the Load Port to material handling equipment (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: PortStateInfoArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of PortStateInfo for all load ports

CxParameterType.name: PortTransferStateArray
CxParameterType.Description: Load Port Transfer State for all load ports

CxParameterType.name: ReasonEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Reason for transition 14, SlotMapNotRead to WaitingForHost. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: VerificationNeeded - Equipment needs host to verify carrier ID (corresponds to SECS value 0)
VerificationByEquipmentUnsuccessful - Equipment failed to verify the carrier ID (corresponds to SECS value 1)
ReadFail - Failed to read carrier ID (corresponds to SECS value 2)
ImproperSubstratePosition - Improper Substrate Position (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: SlotMapArray
CxParameterType.Description: Ordered list of slot status corresponding to slot 1,2,3,...n

CxParameterType.name: SlotMapStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: State of the slot map verification. This is defined as a numeric enumeration in E87.1 but has been converted to strings for EDA

EnumeratedInteger.Description: SlotMapNotRead - Carrier has been loaded but the slot map has not been read by the equipment (corresponds to SECS value 0)
WaitingForHost - Equipment is waiting for input from the host (corresponds to SECS value 1)
SlotMapVerificationOk - Slot map has been verified (corresponds to SECS value 2)
SlotMapVerificationFailed - Slot map has been read by the equipment and has failed verification by the host (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: SubstGroupStringArray
CxParameterType.Description: Array of values for a substrate group event; each string holds an identifier of a substrate or a location as appropriate

CxParameterType.name: SubstHistoryArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of Substrate Histories

CxParameterType.name: SubstHistoryEntryArray
CxParameterType.Description: History of locations visited

CxParameterType.name: SubstHistoryEntry
CxParameterType.Description: Information about a location the substrate visited

Field.name: Location
Field.Description: The SubstLocID or BatchLocID.SubstPosInBatch for the location

Field.name: TimeIn
Field.Description: Time the substrate entered the location. This parameter is reported in the E5 time format, not the GEM selected format

Field.name: TimeOut
Field.Description: Time the substrate exited the location; empty until the substrate departs the location. This parameter is reported in the E5 time format, not the GEM selected format

CxParameterType.name: SubstIDStatusArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of substrate ID status values

CxParameterType.name: SubstIDStatusEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Status of the substrate ID.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: NotConfirmed - The substrate identifier has not been confirmed (corresponds to SECS value 0)
WaitingForHost - Substrate ID could not be identified by the reader, was discovered to be at a wrong source location, or no matching ID in the source set (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Confirmed - Substrate ID has been confirmed by the equipment or the host after it was read (corresponds to SECS value 2)
ConfirmationFailed - Host decides to cancel the substrate (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: SubstMtrlStatusArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of material status values

CxParameterType.name: SubstProcStateArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of substrate processing states

CxParameterType.name: SubstProcStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Processing state of the substrate.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: NeedsProcessing - Processing in the equipment is required and has not started (corresponds to SECS value 0)
InProcess - Processing has started (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Processed - Processing has completed normally (corresponds to SECS value 2)
Aborted - Processing has terminated abnormally (corresponds to SECS value 3)
Stopped - Processing has terminated at completion of a certain processing step (corresponds to SECS value 4)
Rejected - Substrate has been identified as needing special treatment (corresponds to SECS value 5)
Lost - Substrate has been removed from the equipment by an external agent or it is physically missing (corresponds to SECS value 6)
Skipped - Substrate was not processed (corresponds to SECS value 7)

CxParameterType.name: SubstStateArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of substrate transport states

CxParameterType.name: SubstStateEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Transport state of the substrate.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: AtSource - Substrate is at the original location it was received (corresponds to SECS value 0)
AtWork - Substrate has been taken from the original substrate location, and is traveling on intermediate equipment substrate locations (corresponds to SECS value 1)
AtDestination - Substrate has been placed at its designated destination substrate location (corresponds to SECS value 2)

CxParameterType.name: SubstTypeArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of substrate types

CxParameterType.name: SubstTypeEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Type of substrate.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Wafer (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Flat Panel (corresponds to SECS value 1)
CD (corresponds to SECS value 2)
Mask (corresponds to SECS value 3)

CxParameterType.name: SubstUsageArray
CxParameterType.Description: List of substrate usage values

CxParameterType.name: SubstUsageEnum
CxParameterType.Description: Defines how the substrate is used.

EnumeratedInteger.Description: Product - Substrate contains product being created by the facility (corresponds to SECS value 0)
Test - Substrate used for testing processes (corresponds to SECS value 1)
Filler - Substrate used to fill open positions (corresponds to SECS value 2)

CxParameter.name: ModuleProcessCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the Module Process state machine

CxParameter.name: ModuleProcessPrevState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the previous state of the Module Process state machine

CxStateMachineInstance.name: ModuleProcessInst
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Module Process State Model for chamber 1

CxParameter.name: ModuleProcessCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the Module Process state machine

CxParameter.name: ModuleProcessPrevState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the previous state of the Module Process state machine

CxEvent.Description: MPT SM module state for change module 1

CxParameter.name: DisableEvents
CxParameter.Description: When set to TRUE>the transitions for substrate location 13 do not generate events to the host

CxParameter.name: MaterialID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the material in the location. This is a generic parameter defined for all material locations and will provide the same value as SubstID

CxParameter.name: SubstID
CxParameter.Description: Substrate identifier relevant to the location.

CxParameter.name: SubstLocID
CxParameter.Description: Identifier of the substrate location. This parameter merges the E90 SubstLocIDi SV and the SubstLocID DV (since EDA identifies instances with the event sourceID). This value never changes and should match the name of the MaterialLocation

CxParameter.name: SubstLocState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the SubstrateLocation state machine. This value matches the SubstLocState with the exception of NoState

CxParameter.name: SubstrateLocationCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the SubstrateLocation state machine. This value matches the SubstLocState with the exception of NoState

CxStateMachineInstance.name: E90SLSM
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Substrate Location State Model for chamber 5

CxParameter.name: SubstrateLocationCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the SubstrateLocation state machine. This value matches the SubstLocState with the exception of NoState

CxEvent.name: E90_Loc_Occupied2Unoccupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate moves off the location

CxEvent.name: E90_Loc_Unoccupied2Occupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate moves onto the substrate location

CxEvent.name: NoState2Occupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate location is initialized without a substrate in the location

CxEvent.name: NoState2Unoccupied
CxEvent.Description: Substrate location is initialized without a substrate in the location

CxLogicalElement.name: EPTTracker
CxLogicalElement.Description: Non-structural element representing the EPTTracker for Module

CxParameter.name: BlockedReason
CxParameter.Description: A numeric code that identifies the most recent blocked condition of the related EPT module.

CxParameter.name: BlockedReasonText
CxParameter.Description: A description of the most recent blocked condition of the Equipment or EPT module.

CxParameter.name: DisableEventOnTransition
CxParameter.Description: List of transitions (1-9) for which EPTStateChange will not be triggered

Attribute.attrValue: *7*|16|CIMConnectDCIMValentis|1b|DisableEventOnTransition_14|3|48|List of transitions (1-9) for which EPTStateChange will not be triggered|0||c|eCxUndefined|2|0||d|StructureType|0||0|0||0||1|0||7|1162510|0||0||0||0||1|0

CxParameter.name: EPTElementName
CxParameter.Description: A human-understandable name for this equipment or module, which must be unique amoung all objects of EPTTracker type.

CxParameter.name: EPTModuleCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.name: EPTModulePrevState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the previous state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.name: EPTState
CxParameter.Description: The current EPT state of this equipment or EPT module.

CxParameter.name: EPTStateTime
CxParameter.Description: Time spent in the previous EPT State, prior to entering the current EPTState.

CxParameter.name: PreviousEPTState
CxParameter.Description: The PreviousEPTState provides the previous EPT state enumerated value and EPTEquipmentPrevState provides the EPT state identifier for the state machine previous state.

CxParameter.name: PreviousTaskName
CxParameter.Description: Name of the EPT Task previously running on the EPT module, prior to starting the current EPT Task.

CxParameter.name: PreviousTaskType
CxParameter.Description: Type of the EPT Task previously running on this EPT module, prior to starting the current EPT Task.

CxParameter.name: TaskName
CxParameter.Description: Name of the EPT Task currently running on this EPT module.

CxParameter.name: TaskType
CxParameter.Description: The type of EPT Task currently running on this EPT module.

CxStateMachineInstance.name: EPTModuleInst14
CxStateMachineInstance.Description: Equipment Performance State Model for processing chamber 5

CxParameter.name: EPTModuleCurrState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the current state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxParameter.name: EPTModulePrevState
CxParameter.Description: State Id of the previous state of the EPTModule state machine.

CxEvent.name: EPTStateChange
CxEvent.Description: EPT SM module state change
